name: robots
stylePhrase: clean sci-fi 3D game asset render, an actual mech/robot body built from articulated parts -- visible shoulder-joint collar, ball-and-socket neck joint, hydraulic piston struts, exposed servo motor housings, sharp panel lines and rivet seams, small stabilizer feet flaring at the base -- not a smooth painted chess shape, high detail, consistent top-left studio lighting, ornate, intricate surface detail, richly decorated

w.label: chrome mech
w.palette: polished white and chrome mech plating, brushed metal panels, glowing blue accent lines and joints

b.label: gunmetal mech
b.palette: gunmetal and matte black industrial mech plating, riveted armor panels, glowing orange accent lines and joints

pieces.k: a towering {SIDE} command unit, a true mech body with an articulated torso, visible shoulder-joint collar and neck ring, hydraulic piston struts down the spine
pieces.q: a sleek {SIDE} tactical unit, more slender than the command unit, a true mech body with an articulated waist joint, exposed servo housings, hydraulic piston struts
pieces.r: a heavily armored {SIDE} turret unit built like a boxy mech tower, visible armor plate seams, rivets, sensor slats and vents
pieces.b: a {SIDE} targeting unit with a sensor array, a true mech body with an articulated collar joint and exposed wiring conduits down the shaft
pieces.n: a {SIDE} strike unit built like a mechanical horse head, visible jaw and neck joints, exposed servo linkages
pieces.p: a small {SIDE} drone unit, a compact mech body with a visible neck-joint ring, small stabilizer leg struts flaring at the base like mechanical feet, exposed rivet seams

promptOverrides.wp: single chess PAWN game piece, clearly recognizable classic chess pawn silhouette, the shortest piece on the board, a small round drone-head dome is the very top of the piece, bare and smooth, nothing on it, below the dome a visible ball-and-socket neck joint ring separates the head from the body, the tapered body is an articulated mech drone torso with sharp panel seams, exposed rivets, a glowing blue power-core seam running down the front, small mechanical stabilizer feet flare out at the base like tiny robot feet gripping the ground, polished white and chrome mech plating, brushed metal panels, glowing blue accent lines and joints, clean sci-fi 3D game asset render, an actual mech/robot body built from articulated parts, high detail, consistent top-left studio lighting, ornate, intricate surface detail, richly decorated, centered composition, plain solid gray studio background, no ground shadow, no text
